query: SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME) as cols FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'deploy_history' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('status', 'deployStatus', 'filesDeployed', 'redirectActive')
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3LsDtjPqt12uZuy.1287516f661f --database 5QWxsXug7WsY3BLQHWP3Uh --execute SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME) as cols FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'deploy_history' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('status', 'deployStatus', 'filesDeployed', 'redirectActive')
